title: Pixel's Pack
description: Several in-game tweaks for PvP and design
body:
Simple PvP/Utility pack that changes some in-game items

- Custom item and armor tweaks 
- Lower Shield
- Low/Small Swords
- Clear Water (from above)
- Reimagined GUI (Dark)
- Smaller Utilities (totems for now. I'll readd Smaller Utilities later)
- Explosion Particle Removal  
- Ore Outliner
- Low Fire
- Enchant Glint

I plan to (maybe) add more versions, but currently there are only 1.20 - 1.21 versions.


Have suggestions? Add me (pixxelh)
